THE COURT APPOINTS FOR SETTLEMENT PURPOSES ONLY, PLAINTIFF JEFFREY M. KRIEGER AS THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE CLASS. FINAL APPROVAL HEARING IS SET FOR JANUARY 9, 2014. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ELAINE YAN, ESQ., 916.235.7140, FOR PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KRIEGER.
JOANNA BROOKS, ESQ., 415.439.6282, FOR THE DEFENDANT BUCKLE, INC.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KRIEGER's Motion For For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs To Class Counsel, And An Incentive Award To The Class Representative. Notice Of Motion And Omtion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELAINE W. YAN OF THE STONEBARGER LAW, TEL. NO. (916) 235-7140 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOANNA L. BROOKS OF THE LITTLER MENDELSON, TEL. NO. 439-6282 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT THE BUCKLEY INCORPORATED.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING SOME ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KRIEGER's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted.
THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PARTIES SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT APPEARS TO BE IN THE RANGE OF THAT WHICH MAY BE APPROVED AS FAIR, REASONABLE AND ADEQUATE. THE COURT APPOINTS FOR SETTLEMENT PURPOSES ONLY, PLAINTIFF JEFFREY M. KRIEGER AS THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE CLASS. FINAL APPROVAL HEARING IS SET FOR JANUARY 9, 2014. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Elaine W. Yan, Esq. of Stonebarger Law, Tel. 916.235.7140, for plaintiffs and moving party;
JoAnna L. Brooks, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C., Tel. 415.439.6282, for defendant.

RULING: The Court discussed the wording in the settlement drafts and notice for substance and consistency. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KRIEGER'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is continued by the Court to October 3, 2013 at 9:30 am for further hearing.
